title: simple camera tweaks
description: A simple mod that adds Freelook and Zoom
body:
## Simple Camera Tweaks

**Simple Camera Tweaks** is a lightweight client-side mod that enhances the in-game camera experience with three key features:

- **Freelook**: Move the camera independently of player movement, allowing for smooth over-the-shoulder or cinematic views without affecting your direction.
- **Zoom**: Get a closer look at distant objects or enhance screenshots with a configurable zoom key.
- **Double Hands?**: Shows your offhand at all times (defaults to off, togglable in settings)

### Why Use This Mod?

Perfect for content creators, builders, or casual players who want more control over their visual perspective. Whether you're capturing cinematic footage, exploring intricate builds, or just want a better view of your surroundings, this mod gives you flexible camera options without altering gameplay.
